overview: An integrative medical practice in Pittsburgh, PA offering bioidentical hormone replacement therapy, thyroid treatment, and adrenal support. The practice uses detailed questionnaires, blood and saliva hormone testing, and individualized treatment plans combining traditional medicine, integrative medicine, BHRT, and nutraceuticals.
highlights: Comprehensive blood and saliva hormone testing
targetAudience: Patients seeking integrative medicine for hormone conditions including menopause, andropause, thyroid dysfunction, adrenal fatigue, and PCOS.
